intro: Panicum ternatum, also known as Panicled Panic Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and expectorant properties.
